title: EVT.BSP.001.SCORE_RECALCULE — Score recomputed (design-time documentation only)
description: DESIGN-TIME DOCUMENTATION ONLY. This schema describes the abstract business fact 'the behavioural score of a beneficiary has been recomputed after a transaction or a significant behavioural signal' (carrying OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION) at the meta-model level — see ADR-BCM-URBA-0007 (normalised event meta-model), ADR-BCM-URBA-0008 (event modelling) and ADR-BCM-URBA-0009 (event-capability definition). NO AUTONOMOUS BUS MESSAGE corresponds to this schema: per ADR-TECH-STRAT-001 Rule 2, business events do NOT generate autonomous messages on the operational RabbitMQ rail; only the paired resource event RVT.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT_RECALCULE is published, with the business event name appearing exclusively as the prefix of the routing key per Rule 4 (EVT.BSP.001.SCORE_RECALCULE.RVT.BSP.001.SCORE_COURANT_RECALCULE). This schema is a derived design-time artefact used for traceability, governance, and consumer onboarding documentation; the BCM YAML in bcm/business-event-reliever.yaml remains the source of truth (Rule 6). Beneficiary identity resolution: consumers resolve the correlation key identifiant_dossier toward OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIAIRE.identifiant_interne via a CAP.REF.001.BEN lookup; the producer never carries the canonical identifiant_interne.

identifiant_evaluation.description: Unique identifier of this evaluation. Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.identifiant_evaluation.

identifiant_dossier.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the relevant participation case. Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.identifiant_dossier. Identity resolution: consumers resolve identifiant_dossier toward OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIAIRE.identifiant_interne via a CAP.REF.001.BEN lookup.

valeur_score.description: Numeric value of the behavioural score (post-recomputation). Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.valeur_score.

facteurs_contributifs.description: List of factors that influenced this score, with type and weight. Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.facteurs_contributifs.

version_modele.description: Version of the scoring model used for this computation. Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.version_modele.

type_evaluation.description: Evaluation type — INITIAL (enrolment baseline) or COURANT (post-transaction). Mirrors OBJ.BSP.001.EVALUATION.type_evaluation.
